# Chapter 10: Fluid statics  (~80 pp)
- 10.1 Pressure as a scalar field (10) · 10.2 Hydrostatic pressure (10) · 10.3 Manometers (10) · 10.4 Forces on submerged surfaces (12) · 10.5 Buoyancy and stability of floating bodies (15) · 10.6 Pressure in the atmosphere (10) · 10.7 Failure section: dam breaches and floating instability (13)

**Archetype**: balance, stability. **Project**: measure atmospheric pressure variation over 24 hours; correlate with weather data. **Exercises**: 30.
